rulings.Case Title: CURTIS, MARTHA INDIVIDUALLY ON HER OWN BEHALF AND VS. GIELING, IMOGENE B. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Judicial Determination And Order Of Expulsion Of Imogene B. Gieling From The Partnership J.C.Dream Co. Parners
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 14, 2016 line 1. PLAINTIFF MARTHA CURTIS'Application For Judicial Determination And Order Of Expulsion Of Imogene B. Gieling From The Partnership J.C.Dream Co. Parners DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELIA MEJIA ET AL VS. RICHARD SIGUA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 14, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT RICHARD SIGUA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with 10-day leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege each cause of action properly per CRC 2.112. Non opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC SPEER ET AL VS. SUMMIT LAND COMPANY, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 14, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT H.I.S. PLACE #2 LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Causes of action for nuisance and intentional interference with contractual relations are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC SPEER ET AL VS. SUMMIT LAND COMPANY, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Eric Speer, Aaron Curry, And Christopher Nizers Complaint Against Defendant H.I.S. Place 2 Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 14, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT H.I.S. PLACE #2 LLC's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Eric Speer, Aaron Curry, And Christopher Nizers Complaint Against Defendant H.I.S. Place 2 Llc DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged; attorney's fees and treble damages are not sought against the moving defendant; and the allegations are not irrelevant or improper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 3015-3017 SAN BRUNO LLC VS. KENNY JENTONS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 14, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT KENNY JENTONS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED as follows (1)Defendant failed to shift its burden re: discrimination and failed to cite any authority for the proposition that failure to renew Section 8 contract in and of itself constitutes discrimination under Police Code. No other evidence of discrimination provided. (2) There is a triable issue of fact regarding service of Form 1007. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETHEL MERRIMAN VS. JOHN FESKO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Descovery, To Extablish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 14, 2016 line 5. PLAINTIFF ETHEL MERRIMAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Descovery, To Extablish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant moot, responses provided. Parties' requests for sanctions are denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JON D. PETRAS VS. MITCHELL HUDSON ET AL

PLAINTIFF JON PETRAS' Requesting An Order Compelling Defendant To Appear For Oral Deposition; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition.
